summary: Content Editor E2E Testing - All tests passed. Backend: 16/16 API tests passed. Frontend: Content Editor UI works correctly, all page tabs functional, save functionality works, content changes persist and display correctly on all public pages (Home, About, Garments, Technology, How It Works, Get Started, Contact Us).
critical_code_review_comments: ContentEditorPage.jsx: Well-structured with tabs for all pages, form-based editor with Hero Slides, Product Line, Why Choose Us sections for Home page
ContentContext.jsx: Correctly fetches content from API and merges with defaults (fetched takes priority)
settings.py: GET /api/settings/all-content is public (no auth), PUT /api/settings/all-content requires admin auth - correct design
HomePage.jsx (line 59-84): prepareHeroSlides() correctly prioritizes Content Editor text over image metadata - the bug fix is verified working
All pages (AboutPage, GarmentsPage, TechnologyPage, HowItWorksPage, GetStartedPage, ContactUsPage) properly use useContent() hook to get API content with fallbacks to defaults
seed_data_creation: Test values were created during testing (TEST_STORY_*, TEST_PHONE_*, etc.) and cleaned up at end
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content Editor E2E fully tested. API endpoints: GET/PUT /api/settings/all-content store all page content in MongoDB 'settings' collection with _id='all_content'. Content is structured by page key (home, about, garments, technology, how-it-works, get-started, contact-us). The bug where Hero Slides text from Content Editor wasn't showing on HomePage has been fixed by prioritizing Content Editor data over image metadata in prepareHeroSlides().

backend_api_tests.GET /api/settings/all-content (public): PASS - Returns all content from database
backend_api_tests.PUT /api/settings/all-content (auth requ: PASS - Updates content, requires admin token
backend_api_tests.Content persistence: PASS - Changes persist after multiple GETs
backend_api_tests.All page sections: PASS - home, about, garments, technology, how-it-works, get-started, contact-us all update correctly

frontend_content_editor.Content Editor page loads: PASS - All tabs visible (Home, About, Garments, Fabrics, Technology, How It Works, Get Started, Trunk Show, Contact Us)
frontend_content_editor.Tab navigation: PASS - All tabs load their respective content forms
frontend_content_editor.Hero Slides editing: PASS - 3 slides with Title, Subtitle, Highlight fields
frontend_content_editor.Save functionality: PASS - 'All content saved successfully!' toast appears
frontend_content_editor.Live Preview: PASS - Shows real-time preview of the page being edited

public_pages_content_display.Home page: PASS - Hero slides, Product Line, Why Suits India sections show Content Editor values
public_pages_content_display.About page: PASS - Hero Title, Our Story, Craftsmanship, USP sections display correctly
public_pages_content_display.Garments page: PASS - Hero Title, Intro, Jackets/Shirts/Trousers intros display correctly
public_pages_content_display.Technology page: PASS - Hero Title, Intro, Features list display correctly
public_pages_content_display.How It Works page: PASS - Hero Title, Intro, Process steps display correctly
public_pages_content_display.Get Started page: PASS - Hero Title, Intro, Form elements display correctly
public_pages_content_display.Contact Us page: PASS - Hero Title, India Office details, Email/Support text display correctly

bug_fix_verification.Hero Slides text from Content Editor on: VERIFIED FIXED - prepareHeroSlides() now correctly prioritizes textSlides[index]?.title over img.title

rca_of_the_issue: Original bug: Hero Slides content changes in Content Editor were not reflecting on the home page. Root cause: HomePage.jsx prepareHeroSlides() function was prioritizing image metadata (img.title) over Content Editor data (textSlides[index]?.title). Fix: Changed priority order to use textSlides values first with nullish coalescing (??) to fall back to image metadata only when Content Editor value is null/undefined.
